questions.title: What is the capital of France?
questions.explanation: Paris has been the capital of France since the 10th century.

questions.title: Which of these are programming languages?
questions.explanation: Python and Rust are programming languages; HTML is a markup language.

questions.title: The sun rises in the east.
questions.description: Determine whether this statement is true or false.
questions.explanation: The Earth rotates west to east, so the sun always rises in the east.

questions.title: Water boils at 90°C at sea level.
questions.explanation: Water boils at 100°C (212°F) at standard sea-level pressure.

questions.title: The chemical symbol for gold is Au.
questions.description: Fill in the correct chemical symbol.
questions.explanation: Gold's symbol Au comes from the Latin word 'Aurum'.

questions.title: The largest planet in our solar system is Jupiter.
questions.explanation: Jupiter is the largest planet, with a mass greater than all other planets combined.

questions.title: Order the planets from closest to the Sun.
questions.description: Arrange these planets in the correct order, starting from the one closest to the Sun.
questions.explanation: The order is Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars.

questions.title: Arrange the steps to make a cup of tea.
questions.description: Put the steps in the correct order.
questions.explanation: Boil water first, then steep the tea bag, then remove it, then enjoy.

questions.title: Match each country to its capital city.
questions.description: Draw a line from each country to its correct capital.
questions.explanation: These are the official capitals of each country listed.

questions.title: Match the programming language to its creator.
questions.description: Pair each language with the person who created it.
questions.explanation: These inventors shaped modern software development.
